auth.tagline: AI-powered plant disease detection for farmers — fast, accurate, and multilingual.
auth.name: Full Name

how.title: How LeafAI Works
how.desc: Simple steps to protect your crops with the power of AI.
how.step1_desc: Upload a clear photo of the plant leaf from your device or use your camera.
how.step2_desc: Our CNN model scans the leaf and detects disease regions in real-time.
how.step3_desc: Receive AI-generated treatment steps with voice assistance support.

scanner.title: 🔬 Upload Leaf Image
scanner.prompt: Drop your leaf image here or click to upload
scanner.results_placeholder: Upload a leaf image and click Scan Now to see results.

summary.title: Scan Complete! 🌿
summary.subtitle: Your report has been saved to your history.

voice.title: Voice Assistant
voice.desc: I can help you navigate and read results.
